# Static Assets Credits

These files are provided for the SFML textbook examples.

## Fonts

Noto Sans Regular
License: SIL Open Font License 1.1
Source: https://notofonts.github.io/
License text: fonts/OFL.txt

## Sprites

player.png, enemy.png, bonus.png
License: CC0-1.0
Source: created for this textbook as simple teaching sprites.
Note: published copies use an opaque RGB 0,255,0 background for key-color examples.

## Animation

octopus01.png, octopus02.png, octopus03.png, octopus04.png, octopus05.png
License: classroom textbook asset, provided by the course author for these materials.
Source: course author asset migrated into docs/static/animation/.
Note: published copies normalize the green background to RGB 0,255,0 for key-color examples.
